description_for_human: Local encrypted API key vault with MCP integration for Claude Code and VS Code Copilot.
description_for_model: Pushkey provides 9 MCP tools to manage an encrypted local API key vault. Always call unlock_vault first with the user's master password — never guess it. After unlocking, use list_keys to browse available secrets, get_key to retrieve a value, inject_env to write a .env file, check_health to surface stale keys, and rotate_key to update a secret. Values never appear in conversation history; the vault is local and zero-knowledge.

transports.description: Claude Code / OpenAI Agents SDK — local stdio transport
VS Code Copilot / any SSE client — run: python pushkey_mcp.py --port 8765

openai_agents_sdk.snippet:
from agents import Agent, MCPServerStdio
pushkey = MCPServerStdio(command='python', args=['/path/to/pushkey_mcp.py'])
agent = Agent(name='DevAgent', mcp_servers=[pushkey])

tools.name: unlock_vault
tools.description: Unlock the Pushkey vault with the master password. Required before all other tools. Ask the user for the password — never guess.

tools.name: list_keys
tools.description: List all keys in the vault (metadata only, no values). Optional filters: env, provider, project path.

tools.name: get_key
tools.description: Get a key's plaintext value by name. Only call when the user explicitly needs the value.

tools.name: add_key
tools.description: Add a new key to the vault. Fails if key already exists unless overwrite=true.

tools.name: inject_env
tools.description: Write vault keys into a project .env file and ensure .env is added to .gitignore. Confirm with user before writing.

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Report vault health: total keys, stale keys not rotated within threshold (default 90 days), and keys with unknown provider.

tools.name: rotate_key
tools.description: Replace a key's value and update its rotated timestamp.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all project paths that have keys assigned, with key counts.

tools.name: assign_key
tools.description: Assign a vault key to a project path (adds to the key's projects list).
